privileged_info_summary: The board meeting is for Riverbend Community Hospital District (RCHD) held on November 14, 2024. Key board members include Pat Hollingsworth (Chair), Dr. Marcus Chen (Vice Chair), Theresa Okafor (Secretary/Treasurer), Jim Fredricksen, and Linda Zhao-Espinoza. Staff present includes CEO Sam Dietrich and CFO Angela Rasmussen. Q3 FY2024 financial results show total revenue of $47.2M and total expenses of $44.8M. The proposed FY2025 operating budget is $198.4M. Major approvals include a $890,000 HVAC Phase 2 contract with Quad Cities Mechanical (voted 6-0), and the FY2025 operating budget (voted 5-1 with Jim Fredricksen dissenting). Other board members in attendance were Robert Achebe; Colleen Brannigan was absent due to illness. All vote tallies are documented with specific terminology including 'unanimous', '6-0', and '5-1'.
